Motion For Limited Discovery To Oppose Anti-Slapp Motion Pursuant To Ccp 425.16(G)
Off Calendar May-19-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN MARTIN's Motion For Limited Discovery To Oppose Anti-SLAPP Motion Pursuant To Ccp 425.16(G).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's "motion for limited discovery to oppose anti-SLAPP motion" is ordered off calendar because the anti-SLAPP motion has apparently been withdrawn by defendant John Cowan. (5/6/22 Cowan Brf. 2:5.)

The Court signs the stipulation and proposed order submitted by the parties but strikes the proposed language regarding the setting of a Case Management Conference as Case Management Conferences are set only by Dept. 610.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
